events.title: Spice Caravan Raided
events.message: Bandits hit the northern spice road. Prices are spiking.

events.title: Poor Harvest Reported
events.message: Crop failures up north. Grain is worth its weight in gold right now.

events.title: War Brewing in the East
events.message: Rumours of conflict. Every blacksmith in the region is buying iron.

events.title: Eastern Fleet Arrives
events.message: Three silk galleons docked overnight. The market is flooded.

events.title: Royal Inspectors in Port
events.message: The crown has sent inspectors. Contraband catch chance doubled for 3 days.

events.title: Northern Storm Warning
events.message: A storm is rolling in. No ships will dock for 2 days.

events.title: Mine Surplus
events.message: The eastern mines are overproducing. Coal is cheap right now.

events.title: New Vein Discovered
events.message: A huge gem deposit found inland. Prices will drop soon.

events.title: Pirates Spotted Offshore
events.message: A pirate fleet is raiding ships. One random cargo is lost from your warehouse.

events.title: Merchant's Whisper
events.message: A drunk trader tips you off. Ivory demand is about to surge.

events.title: Border Skirmishes
events.message: Small teritores are fighting at the border. Iron prices rise.

events.title: Market Panic
events.message: A roomer prompted mass market panic to buy rice!

events.title: Salt Mines Flooded
events.message: Floodwaters collapsed several salt tunnels. Preservation goods are surging in value.

events.title: Record Fishing Haul
events.message: Fishermen returned with overflowing nets. Fish prices are crashing.

events.title: Shipwright Contracts Issued
events.message: The navy is commissioning new vessels. Lumber demand is soaring.

events.title: Fever Spreads Through Port
events.message: Citizens are panic-buying herbs and medicine.

events.title: Grand Harvest Festival
events.message: Taverns and nobles are consuming wine faster than merchants can supply it.

events.title: Dockworkers Refuse Labor
events.message: Angry workers have halted unloading operations across the harbor.

events.title: Southern Caravan Arrives
events.message: Rare goods from the desert have flooded local markets.

events.title: Great Forge Destroyed
events.message: A major iron forge burned down overnight. Metal supplies are tightening rapidly.

events.title: Counterfeit Coins Discovered
events.message: Merchants are refusing questionable currency. Trade confidence is shaken.

events.title: Divers Find Pearl Beds
events.message: Coastal divers uncovered rich oyster fields. Pearls are suddenly everywhere.
